name: CYTIVALIFESCIENCES.COM
message: [AI generated] Cytiva is a global life sciences company that provides technologies and services to support research, drug development, and manufacturing. Their offerings include equipment, consumables, digital solutions, and services for biopharmaceutical manufacturing, cell therapy, and academic research. Their solutions are used in the development and production of pharmaceuticals, including vaccines, monoclonal antibodies, and cell and gene therapies.
